entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global shifts in weather patterns that affect the occurrence and severity of plant diseases

entities.name: PLANT DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions in plants that cause yield losses and threaten food security

entities.name: MAJOR CROPS
entities.description: Primary agricultural plants used for global food production

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in agricultural output caused by diseases

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural output over the long term

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: GENETIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherited ability of a plant variety to resist attack by a pathogen

entities.name: PRIMARY GENEPOOLS
entities.description: The original set of genetic diversity available within a crop species

entities.name: CROP GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material within crop plants

entities.name: PATHOGEN GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material within disease-causing organisms

entities.name: NEXT GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing technologies used to map genomes

entities.name: TRAIT GENETICS
entities.description: The study of the relationship between genes and phenotypic traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: An approach to associate genetic variants across the whole genome with specific traits

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes suspected of influencing a particular trait or disease resistance

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Specific physical locations of a gene or marker on a chromosome

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide a plant with the ability to resist diseases

entities.name: ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: Research methods used to identify links between genetic markers and traits

entities.name: STATISTICAL MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical frameworks used to analyze genetic data and improve mapping resolution

entities.name: BIOINFORMATIC TOOLS
entities.description: Software and algorithms used for the analysis of biological data

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The identified link between a genetic marker and a phenotypic trait
